PURPLE BELT WHITE GI.visual: A fighter with short dark hair wearing a white or light grey gi featuring a purple belt and a circular shoulder patch.

NAVY GI WHITE BELT.visual: An athletic or larger-built fighter with short dark hair wearing a navy blue or dark-colored gi and a white belt.

submissions.reasoning: The PURPLE BELT WHITE GI maintains dominant top positional control for the duration of the clip until the pair stops to reset with a fist bump at 30 seconds.
The PURPLE BELT WHITE GI transitions to a cross-body armbar from the bottom guard, forcing the NAVY GI WHITE BELT to tap at the 30-second mark.
The purple belt in the white gi executes an armbar from the top position, leading the navy gi fighter to tap and both to reset.
The purple belt in the white gi catches the navy-clad partner in a triangle choke from the bottom, resulting in a clear tap on the thigh.
